review_title: A Reliable Way to Store and Access Photos!
description: I’ve had a pretty good experience overall using Google Photos. It makes storing, organizing, and finding my pictures so easy, and I love being able to access them from any device. Overall, it’s been a huge time-saver and really reliable for keeping all my memories in one place.
author: Joshua F.
pros: I really like Google Photos because it makes organizing and finding my pictures super easy. The automatic backup and smart search features save a ton of time, and I love that I can access all my photos from any device whenever I need them.
cons: One thing I don’t love about Google Photos is that it can sometimes be tricky to organize large albums exactly how you want. Also, the free storage limits can be frustrating if you have a lot of high-resolution photos.

description: I use it often to send photos to my grandmothers Google hub. I think with extra capital pieces from the Google portfolio, it’s very useful!
author: Ashley B.
pros: I love the automated slide shows that the app puts together from a culmination of what I have to Google photos. I also love the ease of sharing.
cons: That it doesn’t have a robust photo editing tool build onto the app. I feel like this is a missed opportunity and would be awesome to have something with lots of features and editing tools built in.

description: Not great. I've been using the app for a few years, and with every update I had issues with archiving.
author: Carmen B.
pros: Organizing pictures is easy. Finding them is easy. Archiving pictures is not always easy. I can't think of anything else positive.
cons: Archiving some photos is confusing. And very frustrating! Every update seems to make it trickier. I'd like to be able to control the order of albums.

review_title: My awesome experience on Google photos
description: I have had an amazing experience on Google Photos. Google photos is so smooth to use with its incredible features. It is so excellent in keeping photos, editing photos. I like using it so much.
author: John C.
pros: -I like the availability of auto- save options because it saves time a lot and it keeps data properly. - I like as it makes editing so simple to do - I really like the availability of background removal feature as it is so helpful - I really like their customer support team because I find them so helpful - Google photos is so easy to use - I like as it is so affordable - Google photos is incredible in editing photos
cons: I don’t like as there is limited storage I don’t like as compressed photos loose quality sometimes I don’t like the availability of ads

review_title: Google photos.. facial recognition is amazing!!
description: I would rate my experience with Google Photos as a 10 out of 10. It surpasses all of the other photo apps that I've ever used, and I just love the facial identification feature.
author: Renee W.
pros: I utilize Google Photos on a consistent basis, at least 3 to 4 times per week. My favorite thing about Google Photos is that it recognizes the subject in the Picture and anyone with that same face comes up in your photos when you use the search engine. It does not matter if it's when the person was a baby or up-to-date like as an adult, it will include all the photos with that same person in it. Also, for example, if you put in the word waterfalls, every picture in your Google Photos will come up that has a waterfall of any kind in it. The same goes with any other type of scenery, mountains, streetlight, even weather condition such as snow. This is such an awesome advantage over all of the other photo apps that I have downloaded over the years. Hands down my favorite feature on google photos.
cons: Google Photos does tend up to take up a lot of space on your phone so if you don't have a lot of memories then make sure to download it to your laptop or PC as well.

description: It's useful and mostly functional but feels outdated and limited in it's application.
author: Dennis B.
pros: Convenient organization and storage, it has a decent amount of storage for free and it's inexpensive if you want to add more. I like the search and Lens features available.
cons: It lacks deeper photo editing features like adding text and touch-ups. For being one of the biggest tech companies in the world, you would think they would have more to offer. Even after paying for an upgraded service, it's still very lacking. I would like to see the album sidebar be able to be expanded as well.

review_title: Google photos is awesome for individuals and families, just ok for businesses
description: Overall the experience was okay. I run a construction company and we document each job throughout the build process. Google photos allowed us to store all our stuff in the cloud, but left a little to be desired on how things were labeled, stored and categorized.
author: Tyler L.
pros: The user interface is very nice. Batch uploading was very simple. I also like how it plays nicely with other Google business suite tools.
cons: Organizing pictures into different folders and then subsequently being able to quickly return to those folders was not as smooth as other competitors.

description: I have been using Google Photos to save, sort, share and file my photos for about 8 years and I enjoy the ease of use and convenience of its ability to sort and find files with their search bar is game changing!
author: Angela B.
pros: I absolutely love Google Photos because the most because it automatically saves all of my photos in order by date and time. This makes saving all of my files extremely easy.
cons: I can not think of any cons of using Google Photos. The app is great.

review_title: Useful for some things, but maybe not everything.
description: It great for memories or low stakes content. But when creating content, it's not my favorite.
author: Juliana S.
pros: The storage is easy to find and the integrations make content management pretty seamless
cons: To save space, Google compresses your photos and videos if you use Storage Saver instead of the Original Quality setting. I find that my image/video quality diminishes.

review_title: Google Photos is a Great Choice
description: "Free" software with a lot of convenient features
author: Sophia H.
pros: It's FREE! I love the unlimited storage service for free. Also, many features which are syncing the photos automatically, and creating shared folders with others to upload photos in the same folders to share with each other. In terms of the good aspects, Google Photos is the best tool to share photos with others keeping the original quality of photos.
cons: I don't have any problem using Google Photos. Google helps me a lot to organize and gather all the information in many different tools with one account.

review_title: Revolutionising Photo Storage with Innovative Face Identification Feature
description: Highly organised tool for storing photos which helps in identifying the faces and grouping them
author: Sriram P.
pros: AI integration helps in identifying the faces from photos from different age groups and tag them
cons: Limited file storage for free users and lack of compression feature without losing the quality of the photos

description: My overall experience with the gogle photo is best
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: My photo always save and image of quality best
cons: There is a most important think about gogle photo because always safe your data

review_title: Easy access to your good moments.
description: Overall experience is Excellent. Because google photo is downloaded app, it becomes more easier to use.
author: Sara M.
pros: Most like about google photo is easy to access and use. Also, it is organized and divided by date and year.
cons: Limited space but I think if the company gives the users more they will need more also.

description: My experience was Google photos has been nothing but positive.
author: Samantha D.
pros: The number one thing I love most about Google photos is the fact that it will be arranged into files based on faces ,it's pretty sweet!
cons: Honestly, there's nothing I don't like about this product.

description: Safe to keep all yours photos in the best place
author: Douarou J.
pros: Best to save all your memory in on place
cons: To dont lose your file is better to use Google photos

author: Micah S.
pros: There is a lot of storage that comes free with google photos before having to pay.
cons: Can eventually end up with a lot of storage.

description: I am very satisfied with Google Photos, and have since convinced many colleagues and family members to adopt it, too. I highly recommend it to anyone who takes and wants to sort, share, and edit a more than just a few photos.
author: Joshua M.
pros: Google Photos is so easy to use! There is so much to like here, from automatic backups and easy album creation and sharing to project creation and photo editing. Google has done a really good job of adding new features and listening to its community to see what users would like. There are a couple different account subscription options, but all options are incredibly useful and worth it!
cons: There isn't much to dislike here. Sometimes the album sharing settings and automatic sharing can be a bit clunky, but overall the entire product is smooth and free of wrinkles.

review_title: Get all your memories in one place!
description: The app can handle a large volume of photos without a hiccup, and you get excellent photo album services for up to 15 GB without paying anything. That is more than enough for an average user. The app has simplified our lives, always at our beck and call to retrieve our memories!
author: Raj K.
pros: 1. Google Photos neatly organizes all your photos, screenshots, videos, animations, etc., and lets you search them in whatever way you like. 2. You can search for persons, places, items, docs, etc. The incredible search facility lets you organize your photo collection and pinpoint a specific shot in no time. 3. The library keeps all your albums on the cloud. Google's Artificial Intelligence automatically prepares theme-based albums for you. 4. The Recent Highlights feature showcases the images you clicked in the last few days. Similarly, the Spotlight feature automatically takes a person's best picks and creates a collage. 5. It can automatically spot similar shots giving you the flexibility to keep any or all of them. 6. You can share your albums with your near and dear ones or everyone. 7. The feature of sharing your photos with your partner by adding a partner account is fantastic. The moment your partner clicks a picture, you can see the snap instantly from the cloud storage. 8. Every email account gets 15GB of free storage. If you ever feel that space is insufficient, you can always buy more storage space at nominal rates. 9. Google Photos sends stylized photos and animations; more often than not, they are excellent. 10. It is also possible to alter the quality of the photo backup – ranging from original to medium. The cloud backup ensures that your photos are safe, even if you lose your device.
cons: 1. Free storage of 15 GB is not enough and gets filled up pretty fast when you allow backup of videos or insist on original quality. If your storage gets exhausted, you lose proper access to all Google services that are storage based. Your emails will not come in the inbox, which is very awkward. 2. You require excellent Wi-Fi and mobile internet to reap the full potential of this app; otherwise, most of your photos will not be backed up, or you may not access your snaps when needed. 3. The face recognition feature is not perfect, and you need to train the app to confirm that the faces are of different persons. 4. The safety of your data is a big issue, and you may not be entirely immune to data-based advertisements. 5. You can't merge the storage space of multiple email accounts. One of your accounts may be out of storage, while others may be almost empty.

description: Google Photos is a software that I can count on to keep my files secured and updated with the latest files I have intentionally or not store any files that were on my other devices such as a smartphone, tablet or desktop computer.
author: Jonathan L.
pros: They categorize my photos by what is seen in them. For example, if I have three photos of dogs and 4 photos of food, they will conveniently create folders and store those files in them. So, when I open Google Photos the home page will show me my files in the various categories.
cons: As someone who is currently unable to get a credit card, I am unable to purchase more storage when my free 15GB are full. This results in me moving to another software or creating another Google account to store my files there.

description: The experience has been superb because file sharing has been made easier and memories have been kept fresh. I will always choose Google photos.
author: Esther T.
pros: Google photos enables members to share files easily and enjoy the background music while browsing through the files.Fantastic!
cons: Sometimes when one tries to delete a specific file the rest also get deleted without being notified.Otherwise most of the features work just well.

description: for maps the experience with google photo is good I can easily access stored memories that I can easily retrieve without losing image or video quality
author: stephane M.
pros: instant backup and the possibility of being able to recover memories easily in our cloud and also the preservation of the quality of the photos no loss
cons: the only problem is in terms of data consumption when you switch to 4g on your mobile for example it requires a certain internet connection

review_title: Best software to protect your visual data.
description: Would recommend it to everyone as Google is the most trusted platform and will provide you the best service with the best security system. Just go for it guys you don't need to use this software also just keep the automatic backup on and everything will be done by the software for you.
author: Ansh R.
pros: The app is free of cost and this is the best thing about the app it has a storage of 15 GB approximately which is capable of storing lots of data. You can just switch on the automatic backup option in the app and your all photos and videos will get back up by themselves. You can access them back again whenever you want to. Nothing can be better then this.
cons: Everything is great but I think the storage capacity should be improved by Google. As for a photogenic guy who clicks photos every day it doesn't take much time to get your storage full. The app fully works on the Internet connection and it will not work offline this is something which Google need to work on making it compatible when a device is offline too.

description: It is easy to use. I can fill out property management reports with the photos I have there. But it is not good for making saleable stock images.
author: Elyn H.
pros: It is easy to use if all you want to do is take and share low- to medium- quality photos. It automatically backs up everything, so you can find it immediately on your other devices. the photo editor is easy to use and has good custom filters, cropping and rotation to apply quick fixes.
cons: Unfortunately, when you start working with big photos it becomes a problem. It would be nice if it did not automatically backup those, since I was planning to store them somewhere else anyway. Any edits revert the photo to the lower quality small size, so the photo editor becomes useless. It is difficult to go back a few years and delete photos that you no longer need, and you will exceed your storage quota.

review_title: Most Required App For Our Memories ❤️ !!!
description: Fantastic !!!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - Backup our photos in a secured way and access from anywhere and any device. - Provides backup with compressed format without losing quality - Sharing with our friends & family easily and effectively( No more bulk photos sending to everyone). - Easy to find a photo from our gallery with keywords. - Mandatory app for those who wants to keep their memories with them forever.
cons: - Initially they provided these services with unlimited storage quota. But now, they restricted to account storage limit. Thus enable us to have photos within the limit. They may increase free usage quota from 15GB to some extra storage like 50GB. (Will be helpful for those who requires more storage)

description: My Use of Gogle Photos is Pessoal. it Help me to organize my photos.
author: Leo V.
pros: Syncronization is very fast. Vey easy to use.
cons: I Don´t have Cons About Google Photos. It Functions very whell.
